The '''32-18 asteroid shelf''' was a group of [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] in the [[Peragus asteroid field]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1stm}}
